tagline: Get something from somewhere. Bring something for someone.

hero.body: Someone is always going somewhere. Offer the spare room in your bag, share what you brought, or just say what you're after — the right people meet on a single map. You agree, you hand it over, the deal stays yours.

home.editorialTitle: One map. Three ways to meet.
home.editorialBody: Trip capacity, local listings, and open requests all show up on the same discovery surface. Your neighbour might want what's in your tote; someone on your route might have room for what you crave. We make the introduction—the deal stays yours until in-app payments arrive.
home.pillar1Body: You browse by place and corridor—where you are, where you're going—not just a flag on the map.
home.pillar2Body: Publish spare luggage space on trips you already take, or open a request and let offers come to you. Everyday shares use a small finder's fee; trip slots use a fee you agree per slot. Fixed prices today; smarter pricing when we can ship it cleanly.
home.pillar3Body: You agree terms in chat and settle in person or off-platform unless and until regulated in-app payments arrive. We never hold your money today.
home.ctaBandBody: Share what you brought, name what you need, or list trip space as those tools roll out—always near you so meetups stay practical.

kpi.stripFootnote: These numbers describe the curated catalog seed, not live GMV or signups.

signInForm.linkOnWay: A magic link is on its way to {email}.
signInForm.localDevHint: Local dev: if Resend isn't configured, the link is logged in the API console (and visible in
signInForm.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signInForm.errorTooMany: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
signInForm.errorServer: Our auth service is unreachable right now. Please retry.
signInForm.errorSend: Could not send the magic link. Check the address and try again.
signInForm.termsLead: By continuing you agree to our

discover.metaDescription: Listings within 25 km of you. Exact addresses stay private — pins are jittered for safety.
discover.heading: Within 25 km of you.
discover.intro: Pins are jittered to protect exact addresses — we never reveal them. Tap a card to message.

about.metaDescription: The taste of home, without the mystery DMs. Open introductions for diaspora trips, local shares, and open asks.
about.title: The taste of home, without the mystery DMs.
about.subtitle: People are always on the move, and they bring things back for each other. Eushop is the open layer for that, anywhere in the world. We are starting in dense European corridors, where the diaspora flows are best documented, and growing out from there.
about.p1: Eushop exists for the small cravings between visits home: the chocolate that doesn't taste quite right anywhere else, the cheese bar from grandma's fridge, the brand of sausage that means "Sunday" to you.
about.p2: We are not an importer, a warehouse, or a courier. We are introductions: spare luggage space on real routes, open asks, and local shares between neighbours—discovery, identity you can see, and chat that leads to a clear handoff. Regulated in-app payments roll out where law allows; until then settlement stays between you.
about.p3: We are tiny on purpose. No commercial sellers in the loop today. Meet in public, use your judgement, and keep portions neighbour-sized.

trips.metaDescription: Reserve a slot in someone’s spare bag space. Trips already happening between cities, every week.
trips.heading: Upcoming trips.
trips.intro: A traveller heading out next week posts the spare slots in their bag. Reserve one for the jar of Krówki, the Manchego wheel, the Mastiha bottle. We charge a small platform fee on each confirmed reservation; everything else stays between you and the traveller.
trips.emptyDescription: Eushop is brand new and the trip board is quiet. Be the first traveller to share spare slots — or post an ask and we’ll notify you when a matching route appears.
trips.errorDescription: We couldn’t reach the trips service. Try again in a moment, or browse open requests in the meantime.

tripDetail.outageDescription: We couldn’t load this trip. Try again shortly.
tripDetail.platformNote: Eushop adds a small platform fee on confirmation; everything else is yours.
tripDetail.noNotes: The traveller didn’t leave any notes.

tripForm.heading: Post a trip you’re already taking.
tripForm.intro: Tell us where you’re flying, when, and how much spare capacity you have. Buyers reserve slots from a single map; you keep all messaging in-app.
tripForm.slotsHint: How many separate parcels can you carry?
tripForm.feeHint: Buyers may offer more; the floor is what you set here.
tripForm.notesPlaceholder: Anything sellers should know — fragile only, no liquids, dropping at GDN airport, etc.

reservations.heading: Your reservations
reservations.intro: Slots you’ve reserved on other people’s trips. Cancel before departure if your plans change; mark complete once the goods are in your hands.
reservations.emptyDescription: Browse open trips and reserve a slot to see it here.
reservations.errorDescription: The reservations service is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
reservations.signInTitle: Sign in to see your reservations.
reservations.paymentsNotice: Online trip payments use a card hold until the traveller confirms. Refunds, disputes and chargebacks follow our Terms and your card issuer.

reservationForm.heading: Reserve this slot
reservationForm.freeformPlaceholder: 1 kg of Wedel chocolate, 2 jars of ajvar, a copy of Eska Magazine…
reservationForm.freeformHint: Be specific — exact brand, count, and any acceptable substitutes.
reservationForm.feeHint: Minimum for this trip is €{floor}. Higher offers reach travellers sooner.
reservationForm.confirmBody: You’re asking the traveller to bring {what} for €{fee}. They’ll confirm or decline within 24 hours.
reservationForm.successBody: We pinged the traveller. You’ll see updates on this page and in your inbox.
reservationForm.errorGeneric: Could not reserve right now. Please try again.
reservationForm.tripPaymentsFinePrint: If checkout is enabled, you may authorize a card hold for the agreed slot fee plus Eushop’s platform fee (capped at €1.50 or 12% of the slot fee, whichever is lower). Nothing is captured until the traveller confirms.

reservationPayment.holdExplainer: We place a hold for the slot fee plus Eushop’s small platform fee. Nothing is captured until the traveller confirms your booking.
reservationPayment.disputesNote: Chargebacks and refunds are handled under card-network rules; see Terms.
reservationPayment.stripeKeyMissing: Stripe publishable key is not configured — your reservation is saved; the seller will confirm without an online card hold until NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY is set.

reservationActions.confirmCancel: Cancel this reservation? The traveller will be notified.
reservationActions.confirmComplete: Mark this reservation as complete? This releases payment to the traveller.

profilePanel.gateTitle: Sign in to view your profile
profilePanel.approxCityHint: Stored as an approximate area — never the exact address.
profilePanel.preferredLanguageHint: Used in emails and the default UI locale.
profilePanel.inboxBody: Matches, trips, and messages land in one place.
profilePanel.blockedBody: People you have blocked cannot message you, and you cannot message them.
profilePanel.gdprBody: You can export everything we hold or delete your account at any moment.

productPicker.searchPlaceholder: Krówki Mleczne, Mastiha of Chios, Manner Original…
productPicker.emptyCatalogHint: Nothing in our catalog yet. Use the actions below to add what you have.
productPicker.pasteUrlFootnote: We download, strip EXIF, and re-host on Eushop.
productPicker.proposeProductHint: Adds it to the catalog after review
productPicker.errorFileType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP or AVIF image.
productPicker.proposeModalBody: We'll review and merge it into the catalog so the next neighbour can find it instantly.
productPicker.proposeDescriptionPlaceholder: Soft milk-fudge sweets in red waxy paper, beloved at every Polish wedding.
